Operation 'searchPlaces' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks details about return values (Place objects), ranking behavior, and available filtering options. Enhanced version clarifies the forward geocoding purpose, explains input flexibility, specifies return structure, and documents filtering capabilities for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Search OSM objects by name, address, or type. Supports free-form and structured queries.
data.summary_suggestion: Search for places by name, address, or type
data.description_suggestion: Performs forward geocoding to find OSM objects matching the provided search criteria. Accepts free-form text queries (e.g., "Paris", "123 Main Street") or structured queries with separate name, address, and type parameters. Returns a list of Place objects ranked by relevance, including coordinates, address components, and OSM metadata. Supports filtering by result type, bounding box, and country codes.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks details about return values (Place objects), ranking behavior, and available filtering options. Enhanced version clarifies the forward geocoding purpose, explains input flexibility, specifies return structure, and documents filtering capabilities for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'reverseGeocode' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary lacks action clarity. Description is incomplete - missing information about return values (Place object), zoom level parameter effects, and practical use cases. Enhanced version clarifies the coordinate-to-address transformation, specifies return structure, explains zoom parameter behavior, and provides context for AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Search OSM objects by their location (coordinates to address).
data.description_suggestion: Performs reverse geocoding to find the address and OSM object details for given geographic coordinates (latitude/longitude). Returns a Place object containing the nearest address, address components, and OSM metadata. Supports zoom level adjustment to control result detail (higher zoom returns more specific locations). Useful for converting map coordinates to human-readable addresses.
data.reasoning: Original summary lacks action clarity. Description is incomplete - missing information about return values (Place object), zoom level parameter effects, and practical use cases. Enhanced version clarifies the coordinate-to-address transformation, specifies return structure, explains zoom parameter behavior, and provides context for AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'getStatus' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary is generic. Enhanced version clarifies what status metrics are available, specifies the return type, and explains when an AI agent should use this operation (pre-flight checks, monitoring).

data.current_description: Query the status of the Nominatim server.
data.summary_suggestion: Check Nominatim server health and status
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current operational status of the Nominatim server, including database status, API availability, and performance metrics. Returns a Status object containing server health information. Useful for monitoring service availability and diagnosing connectivity issues before making geocoding requests.
data.reasoning: Original summary is generic. Description lacks specificity about what status information is returned (Status object contents) and practical use cases. Enhanced version clarifies what status metrics are available, specifies the return type, and explains when an AI agent should use this operation (pre-flight checks, monitoring).
